overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spacecraft in a video game (Star Citizen), showing the interior dashboard with holographic flight displays. The vehicle ascends through a clear atmosphere during dawn, transitioning from a dashboard-focused view to an open sky view as the sun becomes visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft cockpit interior with holographic control panels

agents.ego_description: pilot seated at controls with gloved hands on flight sticks, initiating vertical ascent from the dashboard view

entered.detail: futuristic flight control panel with orange holographic displays, radar screen, and central targeting reticle
gloved left hand gripping the flight control stick with metallic wrist guard
gloved right hand gripping the flight control stick with metallic wrist guard

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close-up view of the spacecraft's cockpit interior. The pilot's gloved hands grip the flight controls while orange holographic displays illuminate the dashboard. The view through the windshield shows a hazy dawn sky as the vehicle begins its ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper atmosphere ascent with clear sky view

events.description: camera tilts upward from the dashboard interior to reveal the open sky as the pilot's hands lower out of view
sun becomes visible at the lower left horizon, creating a bright lens flare and warm orange glow

agents.ego_description: continuing steady vertical ascent with hands off the controls, maintaining a skyward trajectory toward the upper atmosphere

entered.detail: bright sun low on the horizon creating intense lens flare and warm atmospheric scattering
faint distant lights or structures visible in the upper atmosphere against the blue sky gradient

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward away from the dashboard to reveal the open sky during dawn. The pilot's hands exit the frame as the vehicle continues ascending. The sun gradually appears at the lower left horizon, casting a warm golden light across the cockpit interior while distant orbital structures become visible against the clear blue atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the detailed interior of a spacecraft cockpit into the vast, brightening expanse of a dawn sky. It begins with a close-up of the pilot's gloved hands on the flight controls, where orange holographic displays illuminate the dashboard against a hazy morning horizon. As the vehicle ascends, the camera tilts upward and away from the controls, causing the pilot's hands to exit the frame. The scene then opens to a clear blue atmosphere as the sun emerges at the lower left horizon, shifting the lighting from a dim haze to a warm golden glow. This transition finally reveals distant orbital structures suspended in the sky as the view expands fully toward the horizon.
